product: Mosaic AI Vector Search storage-optimized endpoints are Public Preview
tagline: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers the option of storage optimized endpoints.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers the option of storage optimized endpoints. Storage optimized endpoints have a larger capacity (over one billion vectors at dimension 768) and provide 10 20x faster indexing. Pricing is optimized for the larger number of vectors.
why_it_matters: Storage optimized endpoints have a larger capacity (over one billion vectors at dimension 768) and provide 10 20x faster indexing.

key_takeaway: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers the option of storage optimized endpoints.
